args.sql: SELECT ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(k.omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson, k.teig_id, ST_Area(k.omrade::geography) AS area_m2 FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig k JOIN kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune m ON ST_Intersects(k.omrade, m.omrade) WHERE m.kommunenavn = 'Drammen' AND ST_Area(k.omrade::geography) > 5000;
SELECT ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(f.omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal f WHERE f.omskrivning = '200-års flom';
SELECT ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(k.omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.kartleggingsomrade k;

1.description: Fetch Drammen municipality geometry by name

2.description: Fetch parcels in Drammen larger than 5000 m²

5.description: Fetch quick-clay hazard zones in Drammen

6.description: Calculate distance from parcels to nearest quick-clay hazard zone

7.description: Sort parcels by distance to quick-clay hazard zone ascending
